results.title: NVIDIA Introduces New AI Technologies: RTX Spark, Agentic AI, Vera Rubin Chip, And More — Check Details And Future Plans
results.description: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang unveiled new AI-focused technologies at GTC 2026, including RTX Spark-powered AI PCs, agentic AI initiatives, and the Vera and Vera Rubin chip platforms. The announcements highlight NVIDIA's push to make AI more powerful, practical, and widely deployed across businesses and devices.
